title: Repository Guidelines
text: codeagent R package reimplements agentic coding harness (agent loop, permissions, compaction, hooks, skills, tools, sessions, Shiny UI) top ellmer btw. wrap external CLI — harness reimplemented R. Read CLAUDE.md first touching core subsystem. holds detailed architecture, data-flow diagram, subsystem map, design decisions. file shorter day--day contributor guide; CLAUDE.md deep reference.

title: Repository Guidelines
text: R/: package source — agent loop, tools, sessions, permissions, Shiny server/UI modules. Tool permissions = one central gate. R/tools_gate.R (.install_permission_gate) registers single on_tool_request callback governs every tool (native + btw + Format + MCP) uniformly — tools built mode="bypass" gate sole authority (enforces via ellmer::tool_reject; async/Shiny via maybe_on_tool_request_async). Fine-grained control lives settings$tools (sets/capabilities/overrides); see README → Tool permission control. adding write/exec/net tool, add .TOOL_META gate classifies .- tests/testthat/: unit integration tests; entrypoint tests/testthat.R. - inst/examples/: runnable examples demos; update public behavior changes. - inst/skills/: built-skills (name/SKILL.md format). - references/: exploratory scripts provider-specific experiments (e.g. Databricks, thinking demos). - exec/: CLI entrypoints exec/codeagent.R. - man/, NAMESPACE: generated documentation; refresh via roxygen.

title: Repository Guidelines
text: devtools::load_all(): load package interactive development. devtools::document(): regenerate man/ files NAMESPACE. devtools::test(): run full test suite. testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-permissions.R"): run one focused test file. devtools::check(): run full package checks; target zero errors warnings. Rscript -e 'codeagent::codeagent_app(client)': launch Shiny app client configured.

what: Security (hard rule): never upload or print secrets
title: Repository Guidelines
text: Real API keys/tokens/passwords concrete infrastructure endpoints (real base_url values, Databricks/serving-endpoint hosts, workspace IDs/hosts like adb-<id>.azuredatabricks.net, internal hostnames/IPs) must never appear git-tracked files (source, tests, examples, docs, templates). Use placeholders (-WORKSPACE.cloud.databricks.net, sk-..., <workspace-id>); keep real values .Renviron/keyring (git-ignored). Scan staged diff committing (git diff --cached | grep -iE 'api[_-]?key|token|secret|sk-|ghp_|dapi|azuredatabricks\.net|serving-endpoints'), mask tokens printed remote URLs (sed -E 's#//[^@]*@#//***@#g'), never echo full token/key. secret committed, rotate first, purge git filter-repo. See -secrets skill.

title: Repository Guidelines
text: Use existing base-R style R/: small focused functions, descriptive snake_case names, minimal diffs. Match surrounding indentation spacing exactly. Keep public APIs stable unless change requires . modifying exported functions, update roxygen comments regenerate docs. Non-ASCII: R CMD check rejects non-ASCII characters R source. Use \uXXXX escapes inside string literals — never roxygen #' comments. Tool functions use closure-factory pattern: external resources (connection, checker) captured via factory function. See CLAUDE.md → Development Rules template R/tool_run_sql.R-style reference. Async (coro::async) rules: never x <- (...) inside coro body — coro can’t assign result (assign inside branches, compute async body); avoid bare !!! (use .call()); coro::async() needs literal anonymous function (can’t wrap built function — return promises::() promise plain function instead). See lessons/2026-07-03-shiny-async-interaction.md. Compaction — turn-boundary + mid-loop (two-tier): compaction runs chat$chat(). tool rounds (ellmer’s released on_tool_result, register_midloop_compaction()), budget-aware micro snip runs default (settings$midloop_compact, ) opt-full two-level compact (settings$midloop_full_compact, ) escalates snip isn’t enough. Cleaner target: upstream on_turn_start (fires every request; on_tool_request can’t substitute — fires request, per-tool). See references/plan/13-mid-loop-compaction.md (PR tidyverse/ellmer#1052). Env vars: prefer CODEAGENT_* (CODEAGENT_BASE_URL, CODEAGENT_MODEL, CODEAGENT_API_KEY) OPENAI_* names. Keep provider-specific experiments references/ unless part supported package API.

title: Repository Guidelines
text: Tests use testthat. Place tests tests/testthat/test-*.R group subsystem (e.g. test-permissions.R). change public APIs, tools, examples include update tests covering main path fallback/degraded path. Prefer targeted tests first, broader runs devtools::test(). 测试无误 = 要装到本地才算数。 devtools::load_all() 只在当前 R session 生效；CLI/launcher (--vanilla) 和真实验证跑的是已安装的包。改完代码、跑完测试后，务必用 pak::local_install(".", ask = FALSE, upgrade = FALSE) 把当前版本装到本地，否则你验的不是最新代码。

what: Keep-in-Sync Rules (do this on every code change)
title: Repository Guidelines
text: Rebuild installed package code changes — launcher/CLI entry points run installed package, load_all(): codegraph sync refresh symbol index AI/code-review tooling. Update README.md — new exported functions/features get line matching section; important behavior changes update relevant description. Update tests examples — new/changed functions get tests/testthat/test-*.R coverage; public-API changes update inst/examples/demo_*.R / test_databricks.R. Wire new exported tools — confirm whether need registering .register_all_tools() call chain.

title: Repository Guidelines
text: Use Conventional Commit prefixes (feat:, refactor:, docs:). Keep commit subjects short scoped, e.g. feat: add Databricks thinking example. PRs explain user-visible change, list affected paths, mention test coverage, include screenshots Shiny UI updates.

title: Repository Guidelines
text: Reference docs live .claude/docs/ (project) — read changing subsystem. - Layout: changing chat/sidebar layout, read bslib-shinychat-layout.md. Treat shinychat::chat_ui(fill = TRUE) fill-sensitive — must live inside truly fillable parent (e.g. bslib::sidebar(fillable = TRUE, ...)); extra wrappers/CSS often break sticky-bottom input behavior. - Components: prefer bslib::toolbar() horizontal action groups bslib::show_toast() shiny::showNotification() user-facing notifications. Read bslib-toolbar-toast.md bslib-toast-vs-notification.md adding action bars notifications. - State: consolidate shared session state single shiny::reactiveValues() container (see ui.R state <- reactiveValues(...)); scatter standalone reactiveVal() objects. - Output panel / file viewer: right panel (ui_panels.R output_panel_ui) THREE static navset tabs — Output / Files / File. Opening file renders preview single File tab via server_right.R’s ca_file_view reactiveVal. reintroduce per-file bslib::nav_insert() tabs: inserted card renders outside navset tab-content covers tab strip. Keep file content height-constrained, overflow:auto body. - Startup: keep shell instant. Expensive tool/skill registration deferred session$onFlushed() behind ca_init_overlay (gated state$initializing), chat input stays disabled clears. Pass bare ellmer Chat codeagent_app() lazy path; don’t move tool registration back onto UI-construction critical path. - Slash-command grouping: mimicking shinyAssistantUI, use canonical 6 sections — Context, Model, Customize, Slash Commands, Settings, Support. invent replacement group labels unless user requests different taxonomy.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: codeagent R package — R-native implementation Claude Code CLI capabilities (harness layer), built ellmer + btw. wrap Claude Code CLI subprocess; reimplements agent loop, tools, permissions, compaction, skill system, Shiny UI scratch. Reference docs: .claude/docs/ contains learning materials. Read touching subsystem.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: 安全铁律 — 绝不提交/推送/打印敏感数据： 真实 API key / token / 密码，以及具体基础设施端点 （真实 base_url、Databricks/serving-endpoint 主机、workspace ID/host 如 adb-<id>.azuredatabricks.net、 内网 hostname/IP）绝不能出现在被 git 跟踪的文件（源码/测试/示例/文档/模板）里。示例一律用占位符 （-WORKSPACE.cloud.databricks.net、sk-...、<workspace-id>），真实值只放 .Renviron/keyring （git 忽略）。git add/commit/push 前扫描 diff（git diff --cached | grep -iE 'api[_-]?key|token|secret|sk-|ghp_|dapi|azuredatabricks\.net|serving-endpoints'）； 打印 remote URL 时用 sed -E 's#//[^@]*@#//***@#g' 掩码，绝不回显完整 token。详见 skill -secrets。 每次改完代码必须重装包并更新 codegraph： 这确保 codeagent chat / codeagent_app() 等用安装版运行的入口点使用最新代码。devtools::load_all() 只在当前 R session 里生效，launcher（--vanilla）和 CLI 用的是已装的包。codegraph 不会自动同步，手动 sync 后 kiro 的 codegraph 审核才能看到新符号。 测试无误 = 要装到本地才算数。 每次改完代码、跑完测试后，务必 pak::local_install(".", ask = FALSE, upgrade = FALSE) 把当前版本装到本地——load_all() 只在当前 session 生效，真实验证/CLI/launcher 跑的是已安装的包。 新增功能必须同步更新 README.md： - 新导出函数/新 feature → 在 README 对应 section 补一行 - 重要行为变更 → 更新 README 相应描述 - README 79 commits 不更新已是教训：每次 commit 前检查 README 是否需要同步 改代码必须同步更新测试和 example： - 新增/修改函数 → 对应 tests/testthat/test-*.R 补测试 - 修改公开 API（签名/行为）→ 对应 inst/examples/demo_*.R 或 test_databricks.R 更新 - 新功能 → 加进 inst/examples/test_databricks.R 的 section - 新增任何导出函数，必须同时：① 确认是否需接入 .register_all_tools()/调用链；② 同步写 test-*.R 覆盖主路径和降级路径。 工具函数用闭包工厂模式： 依赖包版本（当前已装）： - ellmer 0.4.1.9000（dev，需 Remotes: tidyverse/ellmer，CRAN 0.4.1 缺 set_model()） - btw 1.3.0.9000（dev，含 btw_tool_files_patch 原子多文件编辑） - shinychat 0.4.0.9000（dev，monorepo，安装路径：pak::pak("posit-dev/shinychat/pkg-r")，注意不是 pak::pak("posit-dev/shinychat")） - mcptools 0.2.1（CRAN） Non-ASCII source: R CMD check rejects non-ASCII characters R source files. Use \uXXXX escapes inside string literals — roxygen #' comments. coro::inside coro::async: Write plain (x gen) — qualify coro::. wrap tryCatch() inside loop. x <- (...) inside coro::async body: coro rewrites control flow assign result expression (fails coro expr_info: “Can’t assign result expression”). Assign inside branch instead ((cond) { x <- } else { x <- b }), compute value async body. Likewise avoid bare !!! splicing inside coro body — use .call(). Also: coro::async() takes literal anonymous function (substitute()s arg), wrap dynamically-built function — return promises::() promise plain function instead (ellmer’s invoke_tools_async() awaits returned promise). See lessons/2026-07-03-shiny-async-interaction.md R/tools_builtin.R .asyncify_gated_tool(). Env vars: Use CODEAGENT_BASE_URL, CODEAGENT_MODEL, CODEAGENT_API_KEY (OPENAI_*). Shiny layout rule: changing chat/sidebar layout, read ~/.claude/docs/bslib-shinychat-layout.md. particular, shinychat::chat_ui(fill = TRUE) must live inside truly fillable parent (example bslib::sidebar(fillable = TRUE, ...)), extra wrappers often break sticky-bottom input behavior. Shiny component rule: Prefer bslib::toolbar() compact action rows prefer bslib::show_toast() shiny::showNotification() user-facing status feedback. Read ~/.claude/docs/bslib-toolbar-toast.md ~/.claude/docs/bslib-toast-vs-notification.md introducing new action bars notifications. Shiny state rule: Use single shiny::reactiveValues() shared session state (see ui.R state <- reactiveValues(...)). scatter individual reactiveVal() objects — consolidate related reactive state one reactiveValues container. mutable cross-module state needed (e.g. active client/chat model switching), add slot shared reactiveValues, standalone reactiveVal. Shiny promise--observer rule (CRITICAL): Never let promise(...) call last expression observeEvent / observe body. , Shiny treats observer async observer holds reactive flush open promise settles — UI invalidations triggered inside observer (e.g. writing state$pending_approval) never flushed browser promise resolves. “pause wait user interaction” patterns: resolve function stored state$pending called later Allow/Deny observer (correct reactive domain). Never use later::run_now() “pump” event loop inside Shiny observer — reactive graph non-reentrant block. Never use promises::() UI updates Shiny — () callbacks run later queue NULL reactive domain write reactiveValues. Shiny async tool approval pattern: approval/question bars (tool gate UI Shiny), use chat_ui(footer = tagList(uiOutput("ca_approval_ui"), uiOutput("ca_question_ui"))) — footer= slot rendered input box. Bars use border-top (coloured backgrounds). Reference implementation: inst/examples/test_shiny_ask_fn.R.
code: pak::local_install(".", ask = FALSE, upgrade = FALSE) codegraph sync   # 更新符号索引，让 kiro/AI 工具看到最新代码 # 正确：外部资源（connection、checker）通过工厂函数捕获 my_tool <- function(con, mode = "bypass") {   force(con)   checker <- .make_permission_checker("MyTool", mode, list(), NULL)   ellmer::tool(     fun = function(query) {       if (!checker(list(query = query))) return("[Permission denied]")       dbGetQuery(con, query)  # con 在闭包里     },     description = "...",     arguments   = list(query = ellmer::type_string("SQL query"))   ) } # 参考：BIP_copilot/R/tool_run_sql.R — tool_run_sql(con) 模式 # Document + rebuild NAMESPACE devtools::document()  # Full R CMD check (target: 0 errors, 0 warnings) devtools::check()  # Load package interactively devtools::load_all()  # Run all tests (281 pass as of Batch 3) devtools::test()  # Run a single test file testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-permissions.R")  # New-style one-shot query (recommended) library(codeagent) chat   <- ellmer::chat_openai_compatible(base_url=Sys.getenv("CODEAGENT_BASE_URL"),            model=Sys.getenv("CODEAGENT_MODEL"), credentials=function() Sys.getenv("CODEAGENT_API_KEY")) client <- codeagent_client(chat, permission_mode = "bypass") codeagent(client, "List all .R files in R/")  # Launch Shiny app (new style) codeagent_app(client, theme = "default")  # From codeagent.md config client <- codeagent_client_config(alias = "gpt41") codeagent_app(client) # WRONG — flush stalls, UI never updates until promise resolves observeEvent(input$btn, {   promise(function(resolve, reject) { state$pending <- list(resolve = resolve) }) })  # CORRECT — assign to throwaway var, end with invisible(NULL) observeEvent(input$btn, {   .pr <- promise(function(resolve, reject) { state$pending <- list(resolve = resolve) })   invisible(NULL)   # observer completes synchronously; UI flushes immediately })

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Tool permissions = one central gate (R/tools_gate.R, .install_permission_gate). tools (native + btw + Format + MCP) built ungated (mode="bypass") governed uniformly ellmer’s rejectable on_tool_request (sync) / maybe_on_tool_request_async (Shiny). Fine-grained control via settings$tools (sets/capabilities/overrides); see README → Tool permission control.
code: User input   → .preprocess_input()         # detect /skillname   → load_skill_prompt()         # Level 2 skill load (on demand)   → agent_loop()                # main agentic turn (was query_loop)       → .build_system_reminder()  # dynamic per-turn context injection       → CompactionController$maybe_compact()   # L1-L5       → ContentReplacementState$maybe_replace()       → HookRegistry$run_user_message()       → ellmer Chat$chat() / stream_async(stream="content")           → tools dispatch (ellmer tool loop)               → central gate on `on_tool_request`  # .install_permission_gate:                   → HookRegistry$run_pre()          #   PreToolUse                   → .gate_decide(): settings$tools overrides > capabilities >                     check_permission()              #   7-mode gate; deny -> tool_reject                   → HookRegistry$run_permission_denied() on deny               → tool execution (built mode="bypass"; gate is sole authority)               → HookRegistry$run_post() on `on_tool_result`  # PostToolUse       → verify_fn (optional)    # re-enter if fails       → HookRegistry$run_assistant_message()       → save_session()

title: CLAUDE.md
code: # Step 1: any ellmer Chat (user picks backend) chat <- ellmer::chat_openai_compatible(...)   # Databricks/Azure # OR chat <- ellmer::chat_anthropic(...) # OR chat <- ellmer::chat_ollama(...)  # Step 2: codeagent_client() injects tools + system prompt → CodeagentClient client <- codeagent_client(chat,   permission_mode    = "bypass",   btw_groups         = c("docs","git","pkg"),   worktree_isolation = FALSE,   verify_fn          = NULL ) # client$chat    — the ellmer Chat # client$settings — named list with all config  # Step 3: use the client codeagent(client, "prompt")          # one-shot agent_loop(user_input, client, ...)  # per-turn (Shiny) codeagent_app(client, theme="default") # Shiny UI

title: CLAUDE.md
text: query.R — codeagent_client() primary factory; builds CodeagentClient S3 object. codeagent() dispatches new/legacy style. agent_loop() called per-turn (query_loop). .register_all_tools() wires tool groups. .handle_agent_error() classifies PTL/rate-limit/network/auth errors backoff. verify_r_tests() built-verify function. permissions.R — Seven-mode gate: default / plan / accept_edits / bypass / dont_ask / auto / bubble. bubble returns "ask" bubble permission parent agent (sub-agent mode). auto uses haiku ML classifier. DenialTracker emits warnings. hooks.R — HookRegistry 12 lifecycle events via HookEvent$*: tool events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure), permission events (PermissionDenied, PermissionRequest), message events (UserMessage, AssistantMessage), lifecycle events (SessionStart, Stop, PreCompact, SubagentStart, SubagentStop). Mount points: agent_loop fires SessionStart(iter 1)/Stop(terminal returns)/PreCompact(maybe_compact); agent_tool fallback fires SubagentStart/Stop. Legacy register_pre()/register_post() still work. tools_builtin.R — 8 core tools (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, MultiEdit, Glob, Grep, LS). return ContentToolResult extra$display (HTML title + markdown) shinychat tool cards. _intent parameter card display. tools_r.R — Wraps btw::btw_tools(). .BTW_GROUPS covers 10 btw 1.2.1 groups: agent, cran, docs, env, files, git, ide, pkg, sessioninfo, web. btw_tool_skill excluded (handled skill system). tool_run_r.R — run_r_tool() wraps btw::btw_tool_run_r() (arbitrary R execution, sandbox) behind permission gate tool name "RunR". destructive_hint=TRUE, never read-→ default mode resolves "ask" (user confirms call), plan/dont_ask → deny, bypass → allow. btw excludes btw_tool_run_r default btw_tools(), gated wrapper execution path. .runr_to_tool_result() special case tool_display.R adapter. tool_display.R — typed tool-card contract + render dispatcher. extra$display$toolcard = {kind, status, icon, title, payload} (private nested key (toolcard), never collides shinychat’s reserved display keys). kind ∈ {code, image, table, diff, text, error}. .tool_result2() builds renders rich card display$html (-chat bubble, rendered natively shinychat inside <shiny-tool-result>, full_screen=TRUE + open=FALSE = collapsed/expandable) display$right_output (right Output panel). render_tool_output(display) dispatcher (code→Prism-highlighted+copy, image→zoomable img+toolbar, table→reactable, diff→base-R-LCS colored, error→styled box). .adapt_tool_result(result) universal adapter called server_chat.R on_tool_result boundary — normalizes native ContentToolResult (raw btw::btw_tools(), web, skills) typed contract, idempotent. 8 builtins + RunR use .tool_result2(); everything else gets typed adapter. Interactivity (copy/zoom/fullscreen/download) document-delegated JS agent.js; CSS classes .toolcard-* styles.css; Prism.js via CDN head_assets(). tools_agent.R — agent_tool() uses btw_tool_agent_subagent btw available; falls back codeagent’s loop. Supports worktree_isolation=TRUE (git worktree per sub-agent). Discovers custom agents .btw/agent-*.md, .claude/agents/. codeagent_mcp_server() wraps btw::btw_mcp_server(). install_codeagent_cli() installs Rapp-based CLI. mcp_client.R — MCP client (M8). register_mcp_client(chat, config) wraps mcptools::mcp_tools() connect EXTERNAL MCP servers (stdio transport via processx child process) register tools onto Chat. Config = JSON path inline list (mcpServers: {name: {command, args, env}}). codeagent_client(mcp_config=) opts . Complements codeagent_mcp_server() (server side). Graceful: missing mcptools/bad config → 0 tools, crash. Sandbox (fs/network isolation) implemented — see references/sandbox-limitations.md (権限门控 + Hook 策略 security model; OS/container sandbox host-layer responsibility). compaction.R — Five-level compaction: - L1 snip_old_tools: replace large old tool results placeholder - L2 session_memory_compact: summarise early turns via compact model - L3 full_compact: fork agent → 9-section <summary> - L4 ptl_fallback: drop oldest turns 413 errors - L5 context_collapse: read-time projection (truncate tool result values) Current flow (task 01 alignment): live maybe_compact() trigger now two-level — snip_old_tools pre-step → session_memory_compact → fall back full_compact (verbatim 9-section prompt). ptl_fallback/context_collapse remain reactive/utility paths. Dynamic per-model window lives R/context.R. Known gap (mostly closed): turn-boundary compaction runs chat$chat(). tool rounds, register_midloop_compaction() (ellmer’s released on_tool_result) compacts two tiers mirroring CC autoCompactIfNeeded: budget-aware micro snip default (settings$midloop_compact) opt-full two-level compact (settings$midloop_full_compact) via CompactionController$compact_now(). Remaining gap timing: on_tool_result fires tool rounds, every request. on_tool_request substitute (fires request, inside invoke_tools, per tool). True parity needs upstream on_turn_start (PR tidyverse/ellmer#1052); see references/plan/13-mid-loop-compaction.md. tools_web.R — web_fetch_tool() web_search_tool(). tools return ContentToolResult extra$display (HTML title + markdown preview humans). WebSearch backend: BRAVE_API_KEY → Brave Search API (real results, 2000 free/month); fallback → DuckDuckGo Instant Answer (entity queries , key needed). WebFetch uses httr2 directly (Chrome dependency). btw web_read_url (needs Chrome) available extra via btw_groups = "web". skills.R — btw-compatible skill system. Skill format: <name>/SKILL.md directories (flat .md files). Uses btw:::btw_skills_list() primary discovery backend. Discovery paths: codeagent inst/skills/ + btw paths + .btw/skills/ + .agents/skills/ + .claude/skills/ + .codex/skills/. .make_skill_tool() registers use_skill ellmer tool LLM semantic auto-trigger; returns ContentToolResult HTML title card. Metadata cache (2-tier): list_skills_meta() caches parsed metadata -memory disk (.skill_cache_read/_write <config>/cache/skills/, keyed cwd + SKILL.md mtime/count signature .skill_dirs_mtime_sig). disk hit returns btw:::btw_skills_list() runs, fresh process skips slow scan; atomic temp+rename writes, best-effort /O (corrupt/missing cache → full rescan). Two trigger paths: user /name → load_skill_prompt() inject; LLM semantic match → use_skill tool call. User custom skills: use ~/.btw/skills/ (~/.codeagent/skills/). client_config.R — codeagent_client_config(alias=) reads codeagent.md / .codeagent/config.md. Supports single client spec ("openai/model") alias maps interactive selection. use_codeagent_md() creates template. memory.R — auto-memory (M6). Persistent agent memory ~/.codeagent/memory/<slug>.md (YAML front-matter name/description + body) + MEMORY.md index. write_memory/list_memories/recall_memories/delete_memory. remember tool (register_memory_tool) lets LLM persist durable facts; recall_memories() injected .build_system_reminder iteration 1 (every turn — model retains ). Survives across sessions. model_switch.R — lossless model switch (M1). switch_model(client, model): Route swaps ellmer R6 private$provider place (Chat object → callbacks/stream_controller/closures untouched); Route B (tryCatch fallback) rebuilds via public API. .resolve_model_chat reuses client_config alias resolution. Shiny uses .swap_provider directly (Route , keep Chat identity); CLI uses full switch_model. See references/model-switch-alternatives.md. settings.R — Priority: env vars > ~/.codeagent/settings.json > .codeagent/settings.json > defaults. .build_system_reminder() injects ephemeral per-turn context (date/iteration/cwd) user message (system prompt) preserve prompt cache. compaction.R .make_compact_chat() — CODEAGENT_BASE_URL set, uses chat_openai_compatible databricks-claude-haiku-4-5; otherwise chat_anthropic. ui.R — codeagent_app(client, pinned_skills, theme, port, launch.browser). Instant startup: UI shell renders first; tool + skill registration deferred session$onFlushed() step behind full-window “Initializing codeagent…” overlay (uiOutput("ca_init_overlay") gated state$initializing), chat input disabled completes. Pass bare ellmer Chat (pre-built CodeagentClient) get lazy path — codeagent_app builds cheap shell client (register_tools=FALSE) registers tools -server. Sidebar accordions: Sessions (1st, open), Customizations, Settings (permission mode + btw tool groups + theme toggle). Skills sidebar panel — ride shinychat’s slash-command typeahead (type /; see server_slash.R). Right output panel (ui_panels.R output_panel_ui) three static navset tabs: Output / Files (jsTreeR tree) / File (single scrollable viewer driven server_right.R’s ca_file_view reactiveVal — clicking file renders preview ; NB: reintroduce per-file nav_insert() tabs, mis-render outside navset cover tab strip). Themes: "default" (pure bslib), "flatly", "darkly" (Bootswatch), "glass" (custom). Tools stream via stream="content" → shinychat renders tool cards automatically. sessions.R / mutations.R — Sessions stored JSONL ~/.codeagent/projects/<hash>/. Session titles fall back first user message (UUID). fork_session() implemented. Lossless persistence (M7): save_session writes chat-state line (contents_record → gzip → base64, JSON-safe) preserving tool requests/results; per-message text lines remain UI display + legacy fallback. restore_session_into_chat(chat, session_id, cwd) prefers lossless state (tool calls intact), falls back text turns pre-M7 sessions. session_id = NULL → continue recent (CLI --continue). Shiny session-load + CLI --continue/--resume use .

title: CLAUDE.md
text: codeagent_client() central factory: takes ellmer Chat, injects tools + system prompt, returns CodeagentClient. codeagent() codeagent_app() accept CodeagentClient first arg; old flat params still work backward compat. tools return ContentToolResult extra$display: title (HTML, use htmltools::HTML()), markdown (human-readable preview), value (LLM-facing text). See ellmer-tool-calling.md full extra$display field spec. WebSearch backends: BRAVE_API_KEY env var enables Brave Search API; without falls back DuckDuckGo (entity queries ). Never rely DDG general questions. btw tool layer: codeagent harness (loop/permissions/compaction/hooks/skills); btw provides R-environment tool set (docs/git/pkg/env/etc). compose, compete. title: CLAUDE.md
text: 对标 Claude Code 的已知缺口，按价值排序。实现前先确认上游（ellmer/btw/shinychat）是否已有原生支持。

what: P1 — Shiny ask_fn（工具审批 UI）
title: CLAUDE.md
text: 现状：CLI REPL 有 .console_ask_fn（readline() 阻塞等待）；Shiny app 的 ask_fn = NULL（默认模式下写操作无交互审批）。 目标：default 权限模式下，Shiny app 对”需要确认”的工具请求弹出审批 UI，用户点 Allow/Deny，结果异步返回给权限门。 实现思路（UI 设计参考 shinychat 的 inline tool-approval 示例，但底层机制完全不同）： 难点：ask_fn 目前是同步回调，Shiny 需要异步等待用户点击。需要用 promises/coro::async 桥接，或改 ask_fn 接口为 promise-returning。
code: # R/server_chat.R 里构造 Shiny ask_fn，注入 codeagent_client() .shiny_ask_fn <- function(session, state) {   function(tool_name, tool_input) {     # 通过 promise + reactiveVal 实现异步等待     # 1. state$pending_approval <- list(tool_name, tool_input, resolve_fn)     # 2. renderUI approval bar → Allow/Deny buttons     # 3. observeEvent(input$tool_allow) → resolve_fn(TRUE)     # 4. observeEvent(input$tool_deny)  → resolve_fn(FALSE)     # 返回 TRUE/FALSE 给 .make_permission_checker   } }

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Claude Code 的 AskUserQuestionTool：agent 在 loop 中途主动暂停并问用户问题，用户回答后 loop 继续。 与 ask_fn 的区别：ask_fn 是权限门（“能不能执行这个工具”），AskUserQuestion 是信息采集（“我需要更多信息才能继续”）。
code: # R/tools_ask_user.R ask_user_tool <- function(session = NULL) {   ellmer::tool(     name = "AskUserQuestion",     fun = function(question, choices = NULL) {       # CLI: readline(question)       # Shiny: showModal + reactiveVal + promise     },     description = "Ask the user a clarifying question and wait for their answer before continuing.",     arguments = list(       question = ellmer::type_string("The question to ask the user."),       choices  = ellmer::type_array("Optional choices.", items = ellmer::type_string(), required = FALSE)     ),     annotations = ellmer::tool_annotations(title = "AskUserQuestion", read_only_hint = TRUE)   ) }

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Claude Code 的 StreamingToolExecutor 区分 read-工具（并发）和写操作（串行）。当前 ellmer 串行执行所有工具。 依赖上游：ellmer 是否支持并发工具执行。关注 ellmer 进展，有原生支持时直接受益，不自己实现。

text: board dependency-aware atomic (BEGIN IMMEDIATE), workers back blocker still progress, crashed worker’s task auto-reclaimed reclaim_timeout dependents aren’t blocked forever (board_reclaim_stale()). board_watch() (built watcher) drives event-driven coordinator / live board view, falling back polling unavailable.
code: # Fixed fan-out: one worker per task team_run(c("review R/a.R", "review R/b.R", "review R/c.R"))  # Work-stealing over a shared SQLite board (balances uneven task sizes) team_coordinate(c("task 1", "task 2", "task 3", "task 4"))  # Task DAG: `blocked_by` gives dependencies by 1-based task index. A task is # only claimed once all its blockers are done, so workers respect ordering # while still running independent tasks in parallel. Cyclic graphs are rejected. team_coordinate(   tasks      = c("build schema", "seed data", "run report"),   blocked_by = list(integer(0), 1L, c(1L, 2L)),   # 2 waits for 1; 3 waits for 1+2   worktree   = TRUE                                 # each worker in its own git worktree ) # LLM-lead coordinator: a lead model decomposes a goal into a task DAG, the team # runs it, then the lead reviews results and re-plans -- up to max_rounds. team_lead("Refactor the parser and add tests for it", max_rounds = 3)  # Live dashboard: point it at a running team's board for a real-time view # (task table + progress + inter-agent messages), event-driven via watcher. team_dashboard(db_path)

title: codeagent — R-native coding agent
text: Every tool call — codeagent-native (Read/Write/Edit/Bash/RunR/Format/…), btw (btw_tool_*), MCP — governed single central gate registered ellmer’s on_tool_request (enforces via tool_reject, ellmer’s tool loop turns error result; gate rides async path Shiny approval bar). Read-tools pass automatically. settings$tools gives three precedence levels (highest first): none matches, decision falls back permissions mode/rules. express “allow reads, ask writes, deny network, always deny btw_tool_git_commit”. PreToolUse/PostToolUse/PermissionDenied hooks fire gate. env block applied environment variables read, works even Rscript --vanilla. Never put API keys settings.json — keep .Renviron CODEAGENT_API_KEY, use keyring (see ).

title: Context Compaction System — compaction
text: Four-level context compaction mirroring Claude Code's design. L1 MicroCompact/Snip: replace old tool results placeholder L2 Session Memory: incremental summary (10K-40K tokens retained) L3 Full Compaction: fork agent generates 9-section structured summary L4 PTL Fallback: drop oldest turns 413/prompt_too_long errors Trigger threshold: model_limit - 20000 - 13000 tokens (e.g. 167K 200K model). Circuit breaker: 3 consecutive failures silence compaction attempts.

what: Model Switching (harness, no Shiny dependency) — model_switch
title: Model Switching (harness, no Shiny dependency) — model_switch
text: Lossless mid-conversation model switching. Pure-R harness functions usable CLI Shiny app. Conversation history (including tool requests/results) preserved across switch. Two strategies: Route (default) – swap ellmer Chat's internal provider place. Chat object identity unchanged, callbacks (on_tool_result), stream controller, closures capturing Chat keep working untouched. Touches ellmer's private R6 field, guarded tryCatch. Route B (fallback) – build fresh Chat new spec, migrate turns via set_turns(), rebuild client codeagent_client() (re-registers tools + system prompt). Pure public API; returns NEW client object. See references/model-switch-alternatives.md 13-point empirical validation behind design.

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: First public release. codeagent R-native reimplementation command-line coding agent, built ellmer btw. provides agent harness (loop, tools, permissions, compaction, hooks, skills) plus CLI REPL shiny user interface.

what: Model tier env var rename — breaking changes
title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: Three environment variables renamed remove vendor-specific names. Update .Renviron / settings.json env block accordingly: Tier aliases used /model codeagent.md also changed: "sonnet" → "main", "opus" → "heavy", "haiku" → "fast". CODEAGENT_MODEL now serves dual purpose: sets default model "main" tier alias (previously CODEAGENT_MODEL CODEAGENT_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL separate; now merged).

what: CLI/ink unified entry point — breaking changes (plan #20)
title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: Default permission mode now "default" across entry points (CLI, Shiny, ink). Previously CLI subcommands defaulted "bypass". Write operations (file edits, shell commands) now prompt approval unless explicitly opt bypass mode. -y / --yolo — new global flag CLI enables bypass mode (skips permission prompts). Equivalent Claude Code’s --dangerously-skip-permissions. Short-hand: -y. codeagent without subcommand now starts interactive REPL directly (equivalent codeagent chat). Previously subcommand required. -p / --print-mode — new flag one-shot non-interactive output. codeagent "query" codeagent -p "query" runs single query exits. -m now means --model (breaking). old -m/--mode alias removed. Use -y/--yolo bypass mode instead. ink_ui() gains yolo = FALSE parameter. TRUE, sets INK_YOLO=1 codeagent backend runs bypass mode. inkai terminal command also accepts -y/--yolo. INK_YOLO env var — set "1" enable bypass mode ink launching inkai command directly: INK_YOLO=1 inkai codeagent. codeagent_app(permission_mode = "default") unchanged — Shiny already correct; pass permission_mode = "bypass" explicitly needed. R/cli_dispatch.R — new internal helpers .ca_resolve_mode() .ca_dispatch() expose CLI dispatch logic testable pure functions.
code: codeagent -y           # bypass REPL codeagent app -y       # bypass Shiny app codeagent run "q" -y   # bypass one-shot query ink_ui("codeagent", yolo = TRUE)   # bypass # or from terminal: inkai codeagent -y                 # bypass

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: codeagent_stream_async() — new exported function. Streams one agent turn asynchronously (coro::async promise). Runs full turn pipeline (compaction, system-reminder injection, session save, cost tracking via get_cost(include="last")). Fires typed callbacks: on_delta, on_thinking, on_tool_request (pre-gate, stream chunk), on_tool_result (typed display contract .adapt_tool_result()), on_error, on_usage. Supports stream_controller cancellation tool_mode concurrent tool execution. codeagent_stream() — synchronous wrapper around codeagent_stream_async() using later::run_now() pump event loop. Handles Ctrl+C gracefully (cancels stream via stream_controller, re-throw interrupt condition). Intended CLI ink frontends. Turn pipeline helpers (R/turn_pipeline.R, internal): .turn_setup() consolidates compaction + resource replacement + system-reminder injection one call. .turn_teardown() consolidates session save + usage + cost_last. now shared console, Shiny, ink. Shiny system-reminder injection fixed. server_chat.R’s stream_task now injects <system-reminder> block (date/iteration/cwd/memory) every turn, matching behaviour console REPL agent_loop(). Console Ctrl+C repair. codeagent_console() now creates stream_controller per turn catches interrupt conditions, cancelling stream gracefully. Previously Ctrl+C corrupt chat state. Callback deduplication. .register_repl_tool_callbacks() now guarded .chat_once() prevent stacking display callbacks codeagent_console() called chat object. .patch_interrupted_chat() retired. Removed call sites. ellmer 0.4.0+ (#840) 0.4.1+ (#643) handle orphaned tool requests AssistantPartialTurn automatically. inkAssistantUI tool cards upgraded. ink_reply_stream() now calls codeagent_stream() available (full turn pipeline + display contract). on_tool_result receives rich display field (title/kind/payload) instead plain string. ink_server() initialises per-session CompactionController / ContentReplacementState / session_id turns properly managed.

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: Task DAG. team_coordinate() gains blocked_by — task dependencies given 1-based index. task claimed blockers done, workers respect ordering still parallelising independent tasks. Cyclic graphs rejected front. shared board’s claim now dependency-aware atomic (BEGIN IMMEDIATE). Worktree isolation + crash recovery. worktree = TRUE runs worker git worktree; board_reclaim_stale() (wired worker loop) resets crashed worker’s timed-task back pending dependents never blocked forever. Event-driven board. board_watch() (built watcher package) reacts board changes without polling, powering event-driven coordinator / live board view (falls back polling watcher unavailable). LLM-lead coordinator. team_lead(goal, max_rounds =) faithfully ports Claude Code’s COORDINATOR_MODE: lead model decomposes goal task DAG, work-stealing team runs , lead reviews results either finishes adds follow-round (bounded loop; decompose/review/coordinate steps injectable testing). Live dashboard. team_dashboard(db_path) standalone Shiny app monitors running team’s board real time — task table (coloured status), progress bar, inter-agent message log.

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: Instant startup. UI shell now renders immediately; slower tool + skill registration runs background behind prominent “Initializing codeagent…” overlay, chat input gated completes. Pass bare ellmer::Chat codeagent_app() lazy path. Skill metadata disk cache. list_skills_meta() now caches parsed skill metadata disk (<config>/cache/skills/, keyed cwd + SKILL.md mtime/count signature), slash typeahead skill tool near-instant every launch first (disk hit skips ~20s directory scan). cache self-invalidates SKILL.md changes skill added/removed. Single-file viewer. Clicking file Files tree now opens one static, scrollable “File” tab (code / Markdown / image / CSV) filename header close button, replacing old per-file tabs overflow cover tab strip.

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: keyring integration (R/keyring.R): Optional API key storage via OS credential store (keyring package). setup.R offers keyring alternative ~/.Renviron backend available. Includes .keyring_available() (session-cached probe), .keyring_store_key() graceful fallback ~/.Renviron, .keyring_get_key(). headless/server environments keyring backend probe returns FALSE functions degrade silently existing ~/.Renviron path. webfakes agent integration tests (tests/testthat/test-webfakes-agent.R): 12 tests mock LLM API endpoint webfakes, exercising full agent loop — tool dispatch (Read, Write, Bash), permission gate (bypass vs plan), error recovery (HTTP 500), skill invocation — without hitting real LLM. Explicit tool names: bash_tool(), read_tool(), write_tool(), edit_tool(), multi_edit_tool(), glob_tool(), grep_tool(), ls_tool() now pass name= ellmer::tool() model can refer tools canonical names (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, MultiEdit, Glob, Grep, LS).

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: Agentic loop (agent_loop()) max-turns, token budget, verification, error recovery (prompt--long, rate-limit, network, auth handling). Seven-mode permission system: default, plan, accept_edits, bypass, dont_ask, auto, bubble (sub-agent decisions bubble parent). Fine-grained rules match tool arguments (e.g. Bash(npm run test *)). Twelve-event hook system covering tool, permission, message, lifecycle events, configurable declaratively settings.json. Five-level context compaction (snip, session memory, full summary, prompt fallback, context collapse). System prompt tone, task, convention, tool-use, R-specific guidance.

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: Core tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, MultiEdit, Glob, Grep, LS. RunR executes R code behind permission gate; sandboxing enabled runs isolated callr subprocess scrubbed environment (secrets hidden), .Renviron reload, wall-clock timeout. btw tool groups (docs, git, pkg, env, etc.), web fetch search, notebook tools, task persistent-todo tools. Optional codebase retrieval via ragnar (vector + keyword search).

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: Sub-agents via agent_tool(), optional git-worktree isolation persistent “sidechain” sessions. Parallel teams: team_run() (fixed fan-) team_coordinate() (work-stealing shared SQLite board inter-agent messaging), capped container’s CPU quota via parallelly. Plan-mode tools let model enter exit read-planning mid-turn.

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: Sessions saved JSONL lossless tool-call preservation; fork, rename, tag, resume, rewind (truncate_chat_turns() / /rewind). Auto-memory persisted across sessions, relevance selection small fast model. settings.json configuration mirroring command-line agents: env block, model tiers, permissions, hooks, MCP servers, sandbox, effort level, . Model switching mid-conversation (switch_model()), lossless possible.

title: codeagent 0.1.0
text: CLI: codeagent executable run, chat/repl, app, skills, mcp, info sub-commands; REPL streams output, shows tool activity, renders reasoning blocks. shiny app (codeagent_app()) tool cards, session management, theme options. MCP server (codeagent_mcp_server(), stdio HTTP) MCP client (register_mcp_client(), stdio) external tool interoperability.
